title: polypodium cambricum subsp. australe
intro: Polypodium cambricum subsp. australe is a sub-species of the Polypodium cambricum fern, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as rheumatism and bronchitis due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium cambricum subsp. australe include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or decocting them in a liquid, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
